message: ci: build libjpeg-turbo from source for x86_64 macOS cross-compile

files.patch:
@@ -14,8 +14,7 @@ jobs:
             arch: aarch64
             target: aarch64-macos
             name: termweb-macos-aarch64
-          # macos-13 is the last x86_64 runner (macos-14+ are ARM64 only)
-          - os: macos-13
+          - os: macos-latest
             arch: x86_64
             target: x86_64-macos
             name: termweb-macos-x86_64
@@ -38,10 +37,20 @@ jobs:
         with:
           version: 0.15.2
 
-      - name: Install libjpeg-turbo (macOS)
-        if: runner.os == 'macOS'
+      - name: Install libjpeg-turbo (macOS aarch64)
+        if: runner.os == 'macOS' && matrix.arch == 'aarch64'
         run: brew install jpeg-turbo
 
+      - name: Build libjpeg-turbo for x86_64 (macOS cross-compile)
+        if: runner.os == 'macOS' && matrix.arch == 'x86_64'
+        run: |
+          brew install cmake nasm
+          curl -L https://github.com/libjpeg-turbo/libjpeg-turbo/releases/download/3.1.0/libjpeg-turbo-3.1.0.tar.gz | tar xz
+          cd libjpeg-turbo-3.1.0
+          cmake -B build -DCMAKE_OSX_ARCHITECTURES=x86_64 -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=/usr/local
+          cmake --build build -j$(sysctl -n hw.ncpu)
+          sudo cmake --install build
+
       - name: Install libjpeg-turbo (Linux x86_64)
         if: runner.os == 'Linux' && matrix.arch == 'x86_64'
         run: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y libturbojpeg0-dev
